name: Characterising AI Models for Cataloguing

description: arXiv:2607.11353v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The creation of digital collections involves not only the digitisation of content, but also the creation of catalogue records for it. This often-overlooked task requires slow and costly expert manual work. In this project, we have evaluated the application of AI models to this task, comparing different implementations and models. This work inclu...
author: Miguel Arana-Catania, Neil Jefferies
